title: bridge-slack: mpsc channel drop returns HTTP 200; message loss silent to caller
description: bridge-slack/src/bridge.rs slack_events: when try_send fails (channel full), the handler returns 200 OK to Slack. Slack treats 200 as delivery confirmed and does not retry. The message is permanently lost with no user-visible signal. This is documented as intentional but creates an invisible failure mode — the sender in Slack sees no error. A logged warning exists (tracing::warn) but that's not user-visible.
